title: How It All Began
overview: Chris, Joy and Gizmo meet Superbook while reluctantly cleaning the attic for Chris' father. Superbook transports the children back in time, where they meet the first man and woman in the Garden of Eden.

title: My Brother's Keeper
overview: Chris, Joy and Gizmo meet Cain and Abel, the sons of Adam and Eve. The travelers witness a jealous Cain who kills Abel, and then gets punished.

title: The Flood
overview: Superbook takes the children back in time to witness the story of Noah and the flood. During the flood, the children board Noah's ark, along with two of every living thing on earth.

title: The Test
overview: The children travel to meet Abraham and his son Isaac. They witness Abraham attempting to sacrifice Isaac on an altar.

title: Here Comes the Bride
overview: The children journey to see the courtship and marriage of Rebecca and Isaac.

title: Double Trouble
overview: The children witness the story of two brothers, Jacob and Esau. Esau sells his birthright to Jacob, but later regrets it and threatens to kill Jacob.

title: A Dream Come True
overview: The children witness the rise to office of a young man, Joseph. The story includes Joseph's slavery in Egypt, his wisdom and revelation, and his becoming governor.

title: The Miracle Rod
overview: The children witness the life of Moses, and his leadership of the Israelites. The travelers see many miracles, such as the parting of the Red Sea and the discovery of drinking water.

title: Those Amazing Trumpets
overview: In this action-packed episode, the travelers experience the battle of Jericho, and the fall of the city walls.

title: Pitchers of Fire
overview: The children witness the victorious story of Gideon and his army defeating the Midianites by shouting and breaking pitchers with torches inside.

title: Muscleman
overview: The children travel back to live the story of Samson, one of the world's most powerful men. Samson gets deceived, captured, and then destroys the temple where he's held a prisoner and slave.

title: The First Christmas
overview: The children experience the first Christmas where they meet Mary and Joseph. Mary bears a child, and King Herod attempts to kill the baby.

title: Miracles of Love
overview: Superbook takes the children back in time to see the highlights of Jesus' life, which includes many miracles.

title: The Best News Yet
overview: The children experience the story of the death and resurrection of Jesus Christ.

title: Mother's Day
overview: Superbook takes the children through time to ancient Israel, where they meet Naomi and Ruth. Ruth falls in love with Boaz and gets married.

title: The Patience of Job
overview: Superbook takes Chris, Joy and Gizmo back in time to meet Job, a wealthy man of great faith.

title: Big Fish and Little Fish
overview: Superbook takes the children on a journey to meet Jonah. Jonah is thrown from a ship and swallowed by a giant fish. The fish them spits Jonah on the shore.

title: The First King
overview: Superbook takes the children back to ancient Israel where they meet Saul, Israel's first King, and see his rise to office.

title: The Giant Killer
overview: The children witness how David kills Goliath the giant with a slingshot. Saul then becomes jealous of David and attempts to kill David.

title: Superbrain
overview: The children experience how King Solomon came to office and how the King rules with wisdom and understanding.

title: A True Prophet
overview: The travelers witness the story of Elijah the prophet. Elijah performs many miracles, spiritually battles the prophets of Baal on Mt. Carmel, and wins!

title: Flaming Chariots
overview: The children witness the exciting story of how Elisha, the prophet, was protected with chariots from the attacking Syrian soldiers. Elisha then leads the captive Syrian soldiers to Samaria.

title: The Lion's Den
overview: The children experience the story of Daniel, who was protected by an angel in a den full of lions.

title: Nehemiah and the Walls of Jerusalem
overview: The children are accused of being spies and thus captured. Rescued by Nehemiah, the children experience the battle to protect Jerusalem without completed walls.

title: The Beauty Queen
overview: The children witness the story of Queen Esther, and how she successfully intercedes for her people to the Persian King. Esther has wisdom on how an internal enemy of the King is deceiving him.

title: The Mighty Convert
overview: The children experience the many miracles of Paul's ministry.

title: Where, Oh Where...
overview: When Superbook falls onto a computer keyboard, Ruffles, a dog, is accidentally transported back into the ancient time of Abram, the patriarch.

title: Hot Dog
overview: The time-travelers come across the city of Sodom, which is about to be destroyed because of its wickedness.

title: The Test of Faith and Obedience
overview: The children again come across Abraham, Sarah, and a newly arrived son, named Isaac. Later, the children witness Abraham's nearly attempted sacrifice of Isaac.

title: Love at First Sight
overview: The children travel to the Mesopotamian city of Nahor, where they witness a group of people seeking a suitable wife for Abraham's son, Isaac.

title: Father's Pet
overview: The children witness the story of Jacob and his beloved son, Joseph, and how Joseph's jealous brothers sell Joseph into slavery in Egypt.

title: All About Dreams
overview: The children travel to Pharaoh's palace in ancient Egypt where they see Joseph thrown into prison unjustly, only to later be released and given a high position of honor as governor.

title: The Hostage
overview: The time-travelers witness how Joseph, governor of Egypt, successfully deals with famine in Egypt. Also, they witness how Joseph will deal with his lost brothers who came to Egypt for grain.

title: The Family Reunion
overview: The children experience how Joseph tests his brothers to determine whether they are repentant about selling Joseph into slavery years earlier.

title: A Gift From Heaven
overview: The children witness how Egypt no longer welcomes the children of Israel, and how the Israelites are now enslaved and treated brutally. A young man names Moses is coming forth to change things.

title: The Burning Bush
overview: The children witness Moses at the burning bush and Moses' demands to Pharaoh to let the Israelites out of bondage and out of Egypt.

title: No More Plagues
overview: The time-travelers experience the many plagues sent upon Egypt to punish Pharaoh for not releasing the enslaved Israelites.

title: So You Want To Go Back To Egypt!
overview: The children witness how the Red Sea parted to provide the Israelites an escape from the Egyptians, and how the closing of the parted sea downs the Egyptian army.

title: Snakes and a Donkey
overview: The children experience a complaining group of Israelites, who are punished with poisonous snakes.  But finally after 40 years, Israel begins to rally round Joshua, their new leaders.

title: Worth Fighting For
overview: The time-travelers witness how Othniel conquers the Canaanite city of Debir because Caleb promised a daughter as a reward.

title: The Good Left Arm
overview: The children witness Ehud's overthrow of King Eglon of Moab. A rebellion has erupted and the Israelites are fighting for their freedom

title: Stick in the Mud
overview: In this action-filled episode, the Israelites defeat an invading Canaanite army who gets trapped in the mud.

title: That's a Promise
overview: The time-travelers are in ancient Israel when Israel is in a state of war, led by a great but rash general names Jephthah.

title: Just Rewards
overview: The children witness the story of Eli and Samuel in the city of Shiloh.

title: A Wonderful Gift
overview: The time-travelers nearly become involved in a war, and Israel demands that a king be established.

title: The Mighty Little Shepherd
overview: The time-travelers meet a young boy named David, who skillfully uses musical instruments and weapons.

title: The Bigger They Come
overview: The children witness the battle between David and Goliath, where the future of Israel as a nation rests upon the outcome.

title: Faithful and True
overview: The children witness Saul's jealousy and hatred for David. Saul is determined to kill David, so David flees.

title: David the King
overview: David, who has an opportunity to take Saul's life, spares Saul. Finally, David is proclaimed King of Israel after Saul dies in battle.

title: In All His Glory
overview: The children experience the dedication of the temple and King Solomon's great wisdom.

title: The Wicked Queen
overview: The children almost experience death when Queen Athaliah decides to kill her "rivals" for the throne, but eventually, the Queen is put to death and a just ruler is installed.

title: A Matter Of Time
overview: The children find themselves in a country about to be invaded by the might Assyrian army. However, God intervenes and destroys the Assyrians. The children then return to the 20th Century.
